hero_desc: A full-featured gym with cardio, free weights, resistance machines, and an expansive group fitness studio for yoga, Pilates, HIIT, and more.
gym_title: A Gym Built for Real Results
gym_subtitle: Los Cab's multi-level fitness center is equipped with everything you need — from cardio machines to free weights — in a spacious, well-maintained environment.

gym_features.title: Cardio Floor
gym_features.desc: Treadmills, ellipticals, bikes, rowing machines, and stair climbers for every cardio preference.

gym_features.title: Free Weights & Resistance Machines
gym_features.desc: A full range of dumbbells, barbells, cable machines, benches, and resistance equipment for strength training.

gym_features.title: Dedicated Group Fitness Studio
gym_features.desc: A spacious studio for yoga, Pilates, Barre, TRX, and all group classes — with specialized flooring and mirrors.

gym_features.title: New Pilates Room
gym_features.desc: A brand-new dedicated Pilates room added in Winter 2026 — featuring reformers and specialized Pilates equipment.

gym_features.title: Personal Training
gym_features.desc: Relaunched personal training program with certified trainers. One-on-one sessions available for all fitness levels.

classes_subtitle: Over a dozen classes offered weekly — included with every Sports, Pickleball, and Tennis membership.

classes_cardio.name: Cardio/Core
classes_cardio.desc: High-energy cardio combined with core strengthening for a total-body workout.

classes_cardio.name: HIIT
classes_cardio.desc: High-Intensity Interval Training — short bursts of intense work followed by recovery.

classes_cardio.name: Cycling
classes_cardio.desc: Instructor-led indoor cycling classes for all levels. Great cardio workout.

classes_cardio.name: Bodyworks
classes_cardio.desc: Full-body strength and conditioning using bodyweight and light equipment.

classes_mind.name: Yoga
classes_mind.desc: Multiple yoga styles from restorative flow to power yoga. All levels welcome.

classes_mind.name: Pilates Mat
classes_mind.desc: Classical and contemporary Pilates mat work for core strength and posture.

classes_mind.name: Barre
classes_mind.desc: Ballet-inspired class targeting legs, glutes, and core for lean muscle development.

classes_mind.name: TRX
classes_mind.desc: Suspension training using your bodyweight for full-body functional fitness.

classes_mind.name: Balance
classes_mind.desc: Focus on core stability, proprioception, and balance for all fitness levels.

classes_dance.name: Fitdanz
classes_dance.desc: High-energy dance fitness class with Latin, pop, and world music rhythms. Fun for all!

classes_dance.name: Line Dancing
classes_dance.desc: Classic and contemporary line dancing — a fun social activity that's also great exercise.

director_text: Our Fitness Director Peggy Pocher oversees all group fitness programming, personal training, and gym operations. With years of experience in sports club management, she ensures every member gets the most from their fitness journey.
cta_text: Fitness classes included with all Los Cab memberships. No extra fees for cardio, Yoga, Pilates, HIIT, and more.
